name: Fraudlogix
description: Invalid-traffic detection and ad fraud prevention platform for mobile, display, CTV and video advertising ecosystems.

seo.title: Fraudlogix — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Fraudlogix: Invalid-traffic detection and ad fraud prevention platform for mobile, display, CTV and video advertising ecosystems.

when_to_use: Invalid traffic detection for mobile display and video ad campaigns
Bot traffic filtering for SSP and DSP protecting programmatic inventory
CTV ad fraud prevention for connected TV publisher monetization
Pre-bid and post-bid invalid traffic scoring for programmatic ad buyers

pros: Broad IVT coverage across display, video, CTV and mobile
Pricing reasonable for mid-market ad platforms
Easy API integration into existing stacks
cons: Not a full MMP — complements attribution tools
Brand less known than HUMAN or DoubleVerify
Dashboards feel dated compared with newer vendors
Depth of CTV coverage trails specialized CTV tools
review.verdict: Reasonable price-to-coverage on IVT detection, though brand and UX lag Tier-1 verification vendors.
review.best_for: Ad networks, DSPs and mid-market advertisers needing IVT filtering across channels.
review.not_for: Buyers expecting turnkey attribution or top-tier CTV-only forensics.
